title: Neoglaziovia variegata
taxonomy: Neoglaziovia variegata is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. It belongs to the genus Neoglaziovia, which is a part of the large and diverse Bromeliad family. The plant is native to the tropical regions of South America, particularly in Brazil. Neoglaziovia variegata is often classified as a type of epiphyte, which means it grows on other plants or trees without deriving nutrients from them. The classification of Neoglaziovia variegata is further supported by its unique characteristics and growth habits, which set it apart from other species in the Bromeliaceae family.

intro: Neoglaziovia variegata, also known as the Variegated Agavaceae, is a species of flowering plant native to Brazil.
